company.catchPhrase Generates a random catch phrase that can be displayed to an end user. domain

company.catchPhraseNoun Returns a random catch phrase noun that can be displayed to an end user. domain

database.collation Returns a random database collation. domain

database.mongodbObjectId Returns a MongoDB ObjectId string. domain
database.type Returns a random database column type. domain
datatype.boolean Returns the boolean value true or false. domain
datatype.enum Enum helper accepts CSV values or a string array and returns one value at random. Bare CSV is supported as
date.anytime Generates a random date that can be either in the past or in the future. domain
date.between Generates a random date between the given boundaries. domain
date.birthdate Returns a random birthdate. By default, the birthdate is generated for an adult between 18 and 80 years o
date.future Generates a random date in the future. domain
date.month Returns a random name of a month. domain
date.past Generates a random date in the past. domain
date.recent Generates a random date in the recent past. domain
date.soon Generates a random date in the near future. domain
date.timeZone Returns a random IANA time zone relevant to this locale. domain
date.weekday Returns a random day of the week. domain

finance.creditCardCVV Generates a random credit card CVV. domain

git.branch Generates a random branch name. domain
